search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopswitchesbyenergyusage" $orgid$ | rename name as "Switch Name" | stats sum(usage.total) as "Total Usage" by "Switch Name" | sort - 0 "Total Usage"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopswitchesbyenergyusage" $orgid$ | rename network.name as "Network Name", model as "Switch Model", mac as "Mac Address", usage.total as total_energy_usage, name as "Switch Name" | eval "Total Energy Usage"=round(total_energy_usage,2) | table "Switch Name", "Network Name", "Switch Model", "Mac Address", "Total Energy Usage" | sort 10 - "Total Energy Usage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopswitchesbyenergyusage" $orgid$ | rename usage.total as usage_total | eval usageTotal=round(usage_total,2) | search network.name="$row.Network Name$" model="$row.Switch Model$" mac="$row.Mac Address$" usageTotal="$row.Total Energy Usage$" name="$row.Switch Name$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopswitchesbyenergyusage" $orgid$ | rename network.name as "Network Name" | stats sum(usage.total) as "Total Usage" by "Network Name" | sort 10 - "Total Usage"
